calendar.matters:
Petition For Termination Of Proceedings And Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Feb-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Termination Of Proceedings And Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Continued To Feb-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Termination Of Proceedings And Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Dec-01-2010 Continued To Jan-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

There was contact from the Attorney stating that he would not be available. The matter was continued to January 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Examiner is to send further notes to Counsel. An Inventory and Appraisal of the Squaw Valley Developement Company shares and a petition for final distribution is needed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Termination Of Proceedings And Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Continued To Dec-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Myron Greenberg for Evelyn Thomas (Executor).

Mr. Greenberg stated that the Squaw Valley stock shares were worthless, that the Citi Group broker statement is carrying it at a zero value (copy presented in open Court), and that it was not clear if it is part of the Trust. In addition, Mr. Greenberg argued that if there are no assets subject to administration, that he could file the petition to terminate the proceeding and that the Executor is the sole Beneficiary of the Trust that is being established. Mr. Greenberg will file a copy of the Citi Group statement along with a declaration. The matter was continued to December 1, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Court to determine the best way to close out the estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Termination Of Proceedings And Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Oct-20-2010 Continued To Nov-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
